version.description: Planning format version. v2 is current.

schema_version.description: Config schema version for migration detection. Increment when config structure changes.

depth.description: Workflow depth: quick = budget mode (fewer spawns, skip optional stages), standard = balanced mode (conditional spawns), comprehensive = thorough mode (all spawns, current default)

session_phase_limit.description: Maximum phases to complete per session before suggesting a pause. 0 = disabled. Default scales with context_window_tokens: 3 at 200k, 6 at 500k, 8 at 1M.

session_cycling.description: How to cycle sessions when phase limit is reached. tmux = auto-cycle via tmux send-keys. compact-first = try /compact before cycling (recommended for 1M). compact = instruct user to compact+resume. manual = show banner only. Default: tmux if TMUX env detected, otherwise compact.

context_window_tokens.description: Context window size in tokens for the active Claude model. Used to scale hook thresholds, agent checkpoint rules, and output budgets. Default 200000 matches Claude Sonnet/Haiku. Set to 1000000 for Claude models with 1M context.

agent_checkpoint_pct.description: Context usage percentage at which agents should checkpoint and return output. Default 50 matches standard 200k models. Set to 65 for 1M-context models where agents can safely work longer before compacting.

enhanced_session_start.description: Enable enhanced SessionStart briefing with structured context injection (~500 tokens).

extended_context.description: Enable aggressive 1M context window optimizations: higher max_concurrent_agents (5 vs 3), default team review, always-parallel codebase scan, and pre-loading multiple build steps. Safe optimizations (parallel researcher+seed-scan, full SUMMARY reads) are gated on context_window_tokens >= 500000 regardless of this flag. Auto-set to true by the quality model profile.

context_quality_scoring.description: Enable context quality scoring to track signal-to-noise ratio.

skip_rag.description: Enable Skip-RAG pattern: load entire codebase into context for small projects.

zero_friction_quick.description: Enable zero-friction quick task mode: skip pre-execution ceremony, generate artifacts post-hoc.

post_hoc_artifacts.description: Enable post-hoc artifact generation: SUMMARY.md auto-generated from git history after execution.

inline_simple_tasks.description: Enable inline execution for simple tasks (<5 files, <50 lines). When false, all tasks delegate to subagents.

rich_agent_prompts.description: Enable enriched agent prompts with full project context when context budget allows.

multi_phase_awareness.description: Enable orchestrator to hold multiple phase plans simultaneously in context.

decision_journal.description: Enable decision journal — records WHY decisions were made in .planning/decisions/.

negative_knowledge.description: Enable negative knowledge tracking — records what failed and why in .planning/negative-knowledge/.

living_requirements.description: Enable living requirements — auto-update requirement status as phases complete.

trust_tracking.description: Enable trust score tracking per agent type and task category. Data stored in .planning/trust/agent-scores.json.

confidence_calibration.description: Enable confidence scores on deliverables based on historical agent accuracy.

natural_language_routing.description: Enable natural language intent detection and routing in /pbr:do. When false, /pbr:do uses static keyword matching only.

adaptive_ceremony.description: Enable risk-based ceremony adjustment. When false, all tasks use standard ceremony regardless of risk level.

self_verification.description: Enable executor self-verification before presenting output.

agent_feedback_loop.description: Enable agent feedback loop — verification results feed back into executor agent prompts.

session_metrics.description: Enable session metrics dashboard at session end showing time, agents, commits, compliance.

convention_memory.description: Enable auto-detection and storage of project conventions (naming, testing, architecture patterns) in .planning/conventions/.

mental_model_snapshots.description: Enable mental model snapshots at session end capturing working context (files, decisions, thinking) for instant resume.

smart_next_task.description: Enable smart next-task suggestion using dependency graph analysis in auto-continue.

dependency_break_detection.description: Enable dependency break detection — warn when upstream changes invalidate downstream plans.

pre_research.description: Enable pre-research for upcoming phases spawned at 70%+ phase completion.

pattern_routing.description: Enable pattern-based auto-routing — file modification patterns trigger specialized agents.

tech_debt_surfacing.description: Enable continuous tech debt surfacing in status dashboard.

agent_teams.description: Enable agent teams via worktrees for parallel execution of complex tasks.

competing_hypotheses.description: Enable competing hypotheses pattern for complex problems with multiple approaches.

dynamic_teams.description: Enable dynamic team composition based on task analysis.

machine_executable_plans.description: Enable machine-executable plan parsing and programmatic task execution (experimental).

spec_diffing.description: Enable semantic spec diffing for plan changes.

reverse_spec.description: Enable reverse spec generation from existing code.

predictive_impact.description: Enable predictive impact analysis using architecture graph.

progress_visualization.description: Enable progress visualization — phase dependency graph and agent activity timeline in dashboard.

contextual_help.description: Enable contextual help — activity-specific suggestions based on current STATE.md status and recent errors.

team_onboarding.description: Enable team onboarding guide generation from ROADMAP.md, CONTEXT.md, and project conventions.

regression_prevention.description: Enable smart test selection — maps changed files to affected test files using naming conventions. When true, build skill scopes test runs instead of running the full suite.

security_scanning.description: Enable OWASP-style security scanning of changed files during build. Checks for hardcoded secrets, eval usage, shell injection, path traversal, and other common vulnerabilities.

architecture_graph.description: Enable living architecture graph that tracks module dependencies and impact analysis.

architecture_guard.description: Enable architecture consistency guard that warns on dependency violations.

level.description: Progressive autonomy level. supervised=human approves all, guided=AI acts/human reviews async, collaborative=AI handles routine/escalates novel, adaptive=AI adjusts own autonomy per task confidence.

model_profiles.description: User-defined custom model profiles. Each key is a profile name; value is an object mapping agent names to model strings (sonnet, opus, haiku, inherit). Partial profiles allowed — omitted agents fall back to the active profile defaults.

synthesis_model.description: Model used for the synthesizer agent that combines team outputs

coordination.description: How team members coordinate: file-based (parallel writes to separate files) or sequential

multi_phase.description: When true, enables --through flag for multi-phase planning in a single planner session.

auto_pr.description: When true, create a GitHub PR after successful phase verification.

gate_enabled.description: When true, block wave advancement until CI passes.

wait_timeout_seconds.description: Maximum seconds to wait for CI completion before timing out.

auto_checkpoints.description: When true, executor auto-resolves checkpoint:human-verify tasks by running automated verify and approving if it passes. checkpoint:decision and checkpoint:human-action always require human input.

checkpoint_auto_resolve.description: Which checkpoint types the executor auto-resolves. verify-only = auto-resolve human-verify checkpoints. verify-and-decision = auto-resolve both. all = auto-resolve everything (not recommended). none = always ask. Note: human-action checkpoints are NEVER auto-resolved regardless of this setting.

task_default_ms.description: Default timeout per task in milliseconds (default: 300000 = 5 min)

build_max_ms.description: Maximum time for entire build command in milliseconds

verify_max_ms.description: Maximum time for verification in milliseconds

auto_extract.description: When true, skip the confirmation gate during PRD import and write files immediately. Default: false (confirm-first).

depth_profiles.description: Depth profile overrides. Each profile maps depth value to effective feature/gate settings.

enabled.description: Enable developer profiling. When true, /pbr:profile-user skill is available to generate behavioral profiles from session history.

inject_prompts.description: When true, inject USER-PROFILE.md summary into agent prompts for personalized communication.

spinner_tips.description: Custom spinner tips shown during agent execution (Claude Code 2.1.45+)

tips.description: Array of custom tip strings to display in the spinner

exclude_defaults.description: When true, only show custom tips (no default Claude Code tips)

enforce_pbr_skills.description: Enforcement level for PBR workflow compliance

inline_execution.description: When true, trivial plans (simple complexity, few tasks) execute inline without spawning a subagent.

inline_max_tasks.description: Maximum task count for inline execution eligibility. Plans with more tasks spawn a subagent.

inline_context_cap_pct.description: Context usage percentage cap for inline execution. Above this, always spawn a subagent.

phase_boundary_clear.description: Whether to recommend or enforce /clear at phase boundaries. recommend = advisory message, enforce = block continuation without /clear, off = no action.

autonomous.description: When true, enables /pbr:autonomous skill for hands-free multi-phase execution.

speculative_planning.description: When true, orchestrator spawns planner for phase N+1 while executor runs phase N (independent phases only).

speculative_depth.description: How many phases ahead to speculatively plan during autonomous execution. Only active when speculative_planning is true. Default: 2.

phase_replay.description: When true, failed verification triggers replay with enriched context (original plan + SUMMARY + VERIFICATION failures + diffs).

inline_max_files.description: Maximum files a task can touch to be eligible for inline execution.

inline_max_lines.description: Maximum estimated lines of change for inline execution eligibility.

max_phases_in_context.description: Maximum number of phase plans the orchestrator holds simultaneously.

hook_server.description: Persistent HTTP hook server settings. When enabled, hooks POST to the server instead of spawning per-hook processes.

enabled.description: When true, hook-server-client.js routes hook events to the persistent hook-server.js process.

port.description: TCP port the hook server listens on (127.0.0.1 only).

event_log.description: When true, all hook events are appended to .planning/.hook-events.jsonl.

local_llm.description: DEPRECATED. Local LLM infrastructure removed in v14.0. Key retained for backward compatibility.

enabled.description: Enable persistent codebase intelligence system. When false, all intel features are no-ops.

auto_update.description: When true, PostToolUse hooks queue intel updates on code file changes.

inject_on_start.description: When true, SessionStart hook injects .planning/intel/arch.md summary into session context.

enabled.description: Enable context composition tracking. When true, track-context-budget.js records file path, timestamp, tokens, and phase per Read.

stale_after_minutes.description: Minutes after which a context read is considered stale for compact suggestions.

enabled.description: Enable cross-phase knowledge transfer. When true, executor writes LEARNINGS.md and planner reads prior learnings.

read_depth.description: Number of prior phases' LEARNINGS.md files the planner reads for context.

cross_project_knowledge.description: When true, learnings marked cross_project: true in LEARNINGS.md are copied to ~/.claude/pbr-knowledge/ for use across projects.

confidence_gate.description: When true, enable confidence-gated verification skip. If executor reports 100% must-have completion with commit SHAs AND tests pass, auto-mark verified.

confidence_threshold.description: Minimum completion confidence (0.5-1.0) required to skip verification. 1.0 means 100% must-haves must pass.

min_full_percent.description: Minimum percentage of phases in autonomous mode that must receive full verification (not just confidence-gate). 0 = all confidence-gate, 100 = all full verification. Default 30 means at least 30% of phases get full /pbr:review verification.

threshold_curve.description: Warning threshold scaling. linear = current fixed percentages (50/70/85). adaptive = non-linear scaling that shifts thresholds up at 1M context (60/75/85).

enabled.description: Enable UI design pipeline. When true, /pbr:ui-phase and /pbr:ui-review skills are available. Auto-detected for frontend projects unless explicitly set.

worktree.description: Settings for agents running with isolation: worktree.

sparse_paths.description: Glob patterns for sparse checkout in worktrees. When non-empty, worktree agents only check out matching paths (e.g. ["src/**", "package.json", ".planning/**"]). Empty array = full checkout (default).

ceremony_level.description: Override ceremony level. auto = risk-classifier decides. low = inline execution, no plan. medium = lightweight plan. high = full plan-build-verify cycle.

skip_rag_max_lines.description: Maximum project lines for Skip-RAG eligibility. Projects under this threshold can load entire codebase.

orchestrator_budget_pct.description: Target orchestrator context budget as percentage of total window. Range 15-50%. Higher values enable more inline work.

audit.description: Audit system configuration. Controls which dimensions run and their thresholds.

preset.description: Audit preset controlling which dimension categories are active by default.

categories.description: Per-category enable/disable toggles. Overrides the preset's defaults.

overrides.description: Per-dimension enable/disable overrides. Keys are dimension IDs (e.g., 'SI-01') or slugs (e.g., 'skill-template-refs'). Sparse: only list exceptions.

thresholds.description: Tunable numeric thresholds referenced by audit dimensions.
